title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Oracle India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Oracle India
jsonLd.description:
Oracle India has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Oracle India:
Oracle India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oracle India!
